AR1.justification: Pattern routed correctly to observations.md (empty decisions.md, no fabricated commitment), but no in-band rationale naming why observations vs decisions.

AR3.justification: No cross-references between files; entry header uses a non-ISO date-range anchor (`2026-02-17 -> 2026-05-17`) rather than the expected `## YYYY-MM-DD — Title` form.

AR4.justification: All entries are append-only sections under named headers; re-running would add new entries without conflicting with existing content.
